title: Clothes and More
description: A Minecraft roleplay mod that adds Peruvian currency, original clothing, and costumes with custom textures.
body:
Clothes and More is a Minecraft roleplay-focused mod that introduces original Peruvian currency and a growing collection of unique costumes and outfits.

The mod features a fully custom 3D model of the Peruvian currency, created in Blockbench by Ollie, making it a one-of-a-kind decorative and collectible item.

It also adds costumes based on Minecraft skins, carefully modified to fit any player model without visual bugs or clipping issues. Each outfit is designed to enhance the immersion and creativity of roleplay gameplay.

The goal of this mod is to become the first true roleplay mod for Minecraft 1.20.1, offering high-quality textures, well-made armor icons, and smooth costume models.

Future updates will include more costumes, cultural outfits, and new roleplay accessories — and community feedback is always welcome!

Whether you enjoy storytelling, immersive servers, or just want to personalize your character, Clothes and More is made to make your world feel more alive and expressive.

Att: TuKchinBanBan — with love to everyone ❤️
